{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321121926D3709F0AF6F444B971C5"}"},"total":1390},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7305522079352111882","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔不错，对打工人的现状和无奈看到很透彻"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700952835,"group_id":"7288509734028577854","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+FdtRfQx68d4UGpaFzeJBI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"111196368576","user_name":"用户11119636红尘有爱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111196368576","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1717885606,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7288509734028577854","book_info":{"abstract":"【非传统神豪文】+【不随意开炮】+【多女主】+【弥补遗憾】+【享受人生】+【帮助亲友发家致富】+【娱乐圈大鳄】+【医药改革】+【为国为民】

沈川，一介俗人，他最大的梦想，是过上咸鱼一般的生活。
不用为钱发愁，每天睡到自然醒。
玩玩游戏，看看直播，或世界各地去旅游。
梦想很美好，却很遥远。
直到这一天，天降系统。
【叮！系统绑定成功】
【当前级别：土鳖】
【每日财富648，可升级，下一级别每日财富6480】
至此，梦想之光照进现实，沈川的人生发生天翻地覆的变化，
最初，他初心不变，只想享受生活。
可系统不断升级后，野心不可抑制滋生出来。
【叮！系统升级成功。】
【当前级别：大土豪】
【每日财富：6,480,000.00】
......
【叮！系统升级成功。】
【当前级别：大富豪】
【每日财富：648,000,000.00】
....
【叮！系统升级成功。】
【当前级别：富可敌国】
【每日财富：64,800,000,000.00】
他进军娱乐圈，成为资本巨鳄，掌控娱乐圈半边天。
他进军医药圈，不计代价研发药品，以一己之力将进口药品价格压至白菜价，造福国民。
而这，仅仅只是冰山一角......

info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16638,"reply_count":7,"show_pv":71323},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7434012623984362302","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"先说结论：值得推荐。
系统神豪文中少有的非烂大街的剧情和套路。
千篇一律的套路和剧情真不好看，但这本剧情却终于给了不同的视角和节奏。
按理说系统神豪问题那么好的题材理应有更广阔的空间，希望以后能看到更多像这本一样更丰富的剧情。
唯一吐槽：很多剧情没有写，坑还没填完就结束了。虽然算不上草草结束或者烂尾，但依然意犹未尽想继续看后续发展。","text_exts":[{"e":46,"s":43,"text":"不好看","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%8D%E5%A5%BD%E7%9C%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177406676644B971C5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227434012623984362302%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227288509734028577854%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%8D%E5%A5%BD%E7%9C%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730871743,"group_id":"7288509734028577854","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5FbK394z5K/P3TwEQ68nPI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5c54ba40a43344fbae9775a361ed1581~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620842&x-signature=Mx00omIiR0CbAN%2B4ZymeyA9ycGQ%3D","user_id":"5515113537","user_name":"代号陆拾"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"5515113537","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1805166314,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470b
